IRouteVerb Interface

One Identity Manager API Server

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManager
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public interface IRouteVerb

The IRouteVerb type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
ClientProperties
Returns an object providing information about known keys for objects. This property may be null.
ClientSuffix
DefaultResultType
Gets the result type for successfully processed requests.
Description
Gets or sets a descriptive text for this operation. If this is null, use the method-level method description instead (Description).
DeserializationInputType
Gets or sets the type used for deserialization of the input data sent by the client. If none is specified, the value of InputType is used.
EnableCompression
EndpointSecurityIdentifiers
Returns the endpoint security identifiers which manage the permission to call this route verb. If this is null, this endpoint defines its own security identifier.
FkCandidateRoutes
Returns known relations to other routes providing foreign-key candidate objects.
InputType
Gets the expected type of data sent by the client.
ResponseBuilderSelector
Gets or sets the response builder selector.
ResponseCacheKeyGenerator
Gets or sets a cache key generator to cache the responses on the server.
ResultType
Gets the dictionary of output types, depending on the status code.
UseMethodParameters
Gets or sets a flag indicating whether the query parameters defined on the method are applied to this route.
